overall.description: First-person exploration of a dilapidated abandoned house at night, illuminated by flashlight. The player moves through crumbling brick corridors and rooms with damaged walls, debris-covered floors, and holes in the ceiling revealing the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: entry corridor with crumbling plaster walls

events.description: crossing threshold from exterior porch into main interior corridor

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dark corridor, flashlight illuminating damaged walls and debris

entered.detail: walls with large sections of white plaster fallen away exposing red brick underneath
dark doorway leading deeper into the abandoned structure
wooden floor covered with rubble, broken planks, and fallen plaster
red brick walls visible where plaster has crumbled away

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the threshold of an abandoned house, moving through a narrow corridor with severely damaged walls where plaster has fallen away to expose red brick. The flashlight illuminates debris scattered across the wooden floor as the camera advances toward a dark interior doorway.

events.description: turns right to face a closed wooden door in the corner

agents.ego_description: pausing to examine a wooden door in the corner, then turning back toward the main corridor

entered.detail: dark wooden panel door with simple frame set into the crumbling wall
corner where two damaged plaster walls meet

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a corner revealing a closed wooden door set into the damaged wall. After briefly examining the door, the view turns back toward the main corridor, revealing ceiling beams and a doorway leading to a larger space ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main room with wall breach and ceiling damage

events.description: large breach in exterior wall becomes visible showing outside trees and night sky
camera tilts upward to inspect the damaged ceiling with exposed beams and holes

agents.ego_description: pausing to observe the wall breach revealing the exterior, then looking up at the collapsed ceiling sections

entered.detail: large hole in the exterior wall revealing trees and dark blue night sky outside
ceiling with large sections collapsed exposing wooden roof beams and sky
dark wooden structural beams visible through holes in the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Moving into a larger space, the camera reveals a dramatic wall breach showing the night sky and exterior vegetation. The player looks up to inspect the severely damaged ceiling with exposed wooden beams and open holes to the sky, creating a mixed lighting environment of flashlight and ambient night light.

events.description: enters back room through doorway revealing windows with tattered curtains

agents.ego_description: entering a back room and approaching the windows, examining the debris and old furniture

entered.detail: two windows with dirty glass and hanging white curtains letting in faint blue light
broken wooden shelf or cabinet leaning against the wall
old metal lantern or heater sitting on the debris-covered floor
faded floral wallpaper peeling from the walls in the back room

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a doorway into a back room featuring two windows with tattered curtains that let in faint blue night light. The room contains old broken furniture, a metal lantern on the floor, and peeling floral wallpaper, contrasting with the exposed brick of the previous areas.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, crumbling corridor into a larger, dilapidated interior that gradually opens to the night sky. It begins at the threshold of the house, advancing through a tight hallway where the flashlight reveals red brick exposed by fallen plaster and debris scattered across the wooden floor. As the camera turns to examine a closed wooden door in the wall, the view shifts back toward the main path, moving past overhead beams and through a doorway into a more expansive space. The scene then opens up to reveal a dramatic breach in the wall and holes in the ceiling that expose the dark sky and exterior vegetation, blending the flashlight's beam with ambient night light. Finally, the camera glides into a back room where the exposed brick gives way to peeling floral wallpaper, broken furniture, and tattered curtains filtering a faint blue glow from the windows.
